framework.name: eu_ai_act
framework.description: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 — the European Union's risk-based AI regulation. Covers prohibited practices (Article 5), high-risk systems (Article 6 + Annex III), transparency obligations (Article 50), conformity assessment, and post-market monitoring.

controls.name: art-5
controls.description: Asset must not implement any of the 8 prohibited AI practices under Article 5.

controls.name: art-6
controls.description: Determine whether the asset falls into any Annex III high-risk category.

controls.name: art-9
controls.description: Continuous risk management system identifying, evaluating, and mitigating known and foreseeable risks.

controls.name: art-10
controls.description: Training, validation, and testing datasets meet quality criteria including representativeness, relevance, and freedom from bias.

controls.name: art-12
controls.description: Automatic logging of events; logs retained for at least 90 days.

controls.name: art-13
controls.description: Deployers receive technical documentation enabling correct interpretation of outputs.

controls.name: art-14
controls.description: Human oversight measures designed to prevent or minimize risks.

controls.name: art-15
controls.description: Appropriate level of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity throughout the lifecycle.

controls.name: art-50
controls.description: End users are informed they are interacting with AI; AI-generated content labeled.
